title: Moby Trade - Rekt
relevance_summary: Private key leak leading to asset drain via transfer of ownership and subsequent contract upgrades

prevention.rule: Block any tx that transfers ownership of a contract and then immediately calls a withdraw function within the same transaction.

red_flags: Ownership transfer followed by immediate withdrawal
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that transfers ownership of a contract and then immediately calls a withdraw function within the same transaction
summary: Moby Trade suffered a loss of over $1 million due to a private key leak, which allowed attackers to transfer ownership and drain funds from vaults. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions by monitoring for ownership transfers followed by immediate withdrawals.
